requests.title: GDPR consent banner
requests.rationale: Required to run EU marketing campaign and avoid compliance risk.

requests.title: Admin audit log
requests.rationale: Improves auditability ahead of next month's security review.

requests.title: Fix SSO logout bug
requests.rationale: High ticket volume and enterprise trial churn risk.

requests.title: Email verification
requests.rationale: Stabilize onboarding funnel and reduce spam signups.

requests.title: Confetti animation
requests.rationale: Delighter after task completion; not required for next sprint.

requests.title: API rate limiting
requests.rationale: Early signs of automated abuse; rate limits reduce risk.

requests.title: Two-factor authentication (MFA)
requests.rationale: Strengthens account security; recommended after email verification.

requests.title: SSO session timeout configuration
requests.rationale: Enterprise admins want control over session duration.

dependencies.note: MFA setup flows rely on verified email.
Session timeout config should follow logout stability fix.
